input:
Decided to retract the supersession primitive on 2026-05-07.

The migration cascade was too costly for v1 — three separate read paths (fragment detail, wiki regen, search) would all need to know about the supersedes_id column.

Evolution will be captured via the existing edits table snapshots and audit_log emissions instead.
notes: Decision + rationale. Decision and rationale should be separable fragments.
